title: MonoCloud for Startups: One identity layer for your customers, APIs, and agents | Product Hunt
excerpt: MonoCloud is one identity layer for your customers, your APIs, and your agents. Most tools stop at a login box. We go past login into authorization and accountability: decide exactly what every user, service, and AI agent can access, prove what it did, and revoke it in an instant. Fine-grained Cedar authorization, passkeys and SSO, API protection, M2M, and mTLS with certificate-bound trust, all on one platform. Startups get the full platform free for one year.
content_html: MonoCloud is one identity layer for your customers, your APIs, and your agents. Most tools stop at a login box. We go past login into authorization and accountability: decide exactly what every user, service, and AI agent can access, prove what it did, and revoke it in an instant. Fine-grained Cedar authorization, passkeys and SSO, API protection, M2M, and mTLS with certificate-bound trust, all on one platform. Startups get the full platform free for one year.

We go past login into authorization and accountability: decide exactly what every user, service, and AI agent can access, prove what it did, and revoke it in an instant. Fine-grained Cedar authorization, passkeys and SSO, API protection, M2M, and mTLS with certificate-bound trust, all on one platform. Startups get the full platform free for one year.

blocks.html_en: MonoCloud is one identity layer for your customers, your APIs, and your agents. Most tools stop at a login box. We go past login into authorization and accountability: decide exactly what every user, service, and AI agent can access, prove what it did, and revoke it in an instant. Fine-grained Cedar authorization, passkeys and SSO, API protection, M2M, and mTLS with certificate-bound trust, all on one platform. Startups get the full platform free for one year.

sentences.en: MonoCloud is one identity layer for your customers, your APIs, and your agents.
sentences.zh: MonoCloud 是您的客户、API 和代理的一个身份层。

sentences.en: Most tools stop at a login box.
sentences.zh: 大多数工具都会停留在登录框处。

sentences.en: We go past login into authorization and accountability: decide exactly what every user, service, and AI agent can access, prove what it did, and revoke it in an instant.
sentences.zh: 我们超越登录进入授权和责任：准确决定每个用户、服务和人工智能代理可以访问什么，证明它做了什么，并立即撤销它。

sentences.en: Fine-grained Cedar authorization, passkeys and SSO, API protection, M2M, and mTLS with certificate-bound trust, all on one platform.
sentences.zh: 细粒度的 Cedar 授权、密钥和 SSO、API 保护、M2M 和具有证书绑定信任的 mTLS，全部都在一个平台上。

sentences.en: Startups get the full platform free for one year.
sentences.zh: 初创公司可以免费获得一年的完整平台。

content_html_zh: MonoCloud 是您的客户、API 和代理的一个身份层。 大多数工具都会停留在登录框处。 我们超越登录进入授权和责任：准确决定每个用户、服务和人工智能代理可以访问什么，证明它做了什么，并立即撤销它。 细粒度的 Cedar 授权、密钥和 SSO、API 保护、M2M 和具有证书绑定信任的 mTLS，全部都在一个平台上。 初创公司可以免费获得一年的完整平台。
